query: Pick the simplest in-scope issue I can ship and walk it end-to-end.
expected_behavior: Runs Stage 0 local-branch precheck (git branch --list and git stash list for issue-number matches) to surface forgotten in-flight work before starting fresh.
Scores candidates by ease * impact * scope-fit * pr-state with assigned-to-me as a +5 bonus; presents top 8 with rationale columns.
Waits for user confirmation of which issue to take; never picks autonomously.
Writes resumable state to /tmp/issue-autopilot-<issue#>.state.json after every stage transition (atomic rename only).
